title: CRUD: Bulk Actions
intent: Allow selecting multiple rows/items and performing actions.
Keep selection state visible and reversible.
structure: Selection via checkboxes in list/table with a clear selected count.
Bulk action bar appears when selection > 0; includes clear selection action.

keyboard: Selection checkboxes are reachable; bulk action bar buttons are reachable when shown.
aria: Selected count is announced via role="status" (optional).

rules: Always show selected count and provide clear-all selection.
error_messaging: On partial failure, show which items failed and what to do next.
